overview: E-commerce platform for a dive shop selling dive equipment. Frontend UI is 100% complete (storefront + admin dashboard). Requires backend implementation: database setup, authentication system, product APIs, shopping cart, checkout flow, Midtrans payment integration, and admin functionality.

actors.name: Customer
actors.role: End user browsing products, making purchases, managing their account

actors.name: Admin
actors.role: Store staff managing products, orders, customers, and promotions

actors.name: Super Admin
actors.role: Full system access including user management

modules.name: Authentication
modules.description: User registration, login, session management, password reset, email verification. Supports both explicit registration and auto-registration during guest checkout.

features.text: Secure login with session management (HTTP-only cookies)
Forgot password flow with email OTP
Auto-registration from guest checkout with collected user data

modules.name: Product Management
modules.description: Product catalog with variants, categories, brands. Frontend UI exists for both storefront (product listings, detail pages) and admin (product CRUD). Mock data in lib/data/mock-products.ts. No API routes or database. Uses Vercel Blob for image storage. Simple availability flag instead of stock quantities.

features.text: Product CRUD with image upload to Vercel Blob
Product variants (size, color) with individual pricing

modules.name: Shopping Cart
modules.description: Cart system for logged-in and guest users. Frontend UI exists in app/(store)/cart/. Zustand store in lib/store/cart.ts for client state. Needs server-side persistence and API routes.

features.text: Server-side cart storage (database) for logged-in users

modules.name: Checkout
modules.description: Multi-step checkout with guest support and auto-registration. Frontend UI exists in app/(store)/checkout/. Guest users provide contact/shipping data which is used to auto-create an account on order completion.

features.text: Shipping address form with Indonesia-specific fields (province, city, postal code)
Auto-registration on order completion using collected user data

modules.name: Payment
modules.description: Midtrans payment integration for Indonesian market. No implementation exists yet.

features.text: Payment status tracking (pending, paid, failed, expired)
Idempotency keys to prevent duplicate charges

modules.name: Order Management
modules.description: Full order lifecycle from placement to delivery. Frontend UI exists for customer order history and admin order management. Mock data in lib/data/mock-orders.ts. Order status constants in lib/constants/order-status.ts.

features.text: Order list with filtering (status, date range, search)
Order detail view with customer info, items, payment
Order status updates (processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled)
Audit trail for order status changes

modules.name: Customer Management
modules.description: Customer accounts and profiles. Frontend UI exists for account pages and admin customer list. Mock data in lib/data/mock-customers.ts.

features.text: Admin customer list with purchase history

modules.name: Admin Dashboard
modules.description: Admin interface for store management. Frontend UI exists in app/admin/. Dashboard page, products, orders, customers, banners, settings pages all built. No backend functionality.

features.text: Dashboard with sales metrics and charts

modules.name: Promotions
modules.description: Discount codes and promotions system. No frontend or backend implementation yet.

modules.name: Banners
modules.description: Homepage banner carousel. Frontend UI exists for display. Mock data in lib/data/mock-banners.ts. Admin banner management page exists. Needs API and database.

modules.name: Email Notifications
modules.description: Transactional emails for order and account events via Mailgun. No implementation yet.

constraints.text: Frontend UI is complete and cannot be changed significantly
Must use existing tech stack (Next.js 16, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL, Midtrans)
Indonesia-specific: Midtrans payment, Indonesian address format (province, city, postal code)
All prices stored as integer cents to avoid floating-point issues
Soft deletes for products/customers (not hard deletes)
ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration) for product pages
No stock/inventory quantity tracking - simple availability flag only
No product reviews/ratings for initial delivery
